creator: scrappy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->jkh


From Originator: 

Jordan sent me a message on 14 Oct 96 closing a related problem report  
(1515) and stating that the Mitsumi driver bug had been fixed; however, I  
have not tested the new driver myself. 

So, my own answer would be "No, keep it open", but based on Jordan's  
message the actual answer by now may be "Yes, close it".  You need to  
decide.
